title: 关系基石 / Foundations
point: 信任 + 清晰沟通;开场厘清 scope/收费/责任。 / Trust + clear communication; clarify scope/fees/responsibilities.
keyfacts: 管理客户期望 / Manage expectations

title: 持续服务 / Ongoing service
point: 关系含售后检视/答疑/调整,非一次性销售。 / Includes reviews/queries/adjustments, not a one-off.
keyfacts: 随需求变化调整 / Adjust as needs change
